steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Integrations' and subtitle 'Connect external services and APIs to your agent network.'
16 integration cards rendered: thirdweb, supabase, venice, openserv, uniswap, bankr, lido, agentcash, celo, superrare, ens, self, arkhai, metamask, fal, bond_credit

steps.expected: Each card has name, status badge, and toggle
steps.observed: Each card displays integration name, subtitle description, 'Disconnected' status badge with dot indicator, toggle switch, and Configure button

evidence.network: Page loaded without errors; React Router v7 future flag warnings are expected noise

steps.action: Check initial toggle state for thirdweb
steps.observed: is_checked returned false — toggle is OFF

steps.expected: Toggle turns ON, UI reflects enabled state
steps.observed: Toggle turned ON (checked). Snapshot shows switch [ref=e3] [checked]
After page reload, thirdweb toggle still shows [checked] state — confirmed Supabase persistence
is_checked returned false — toggle successfully toggled back OFF

evidence.network: Toggle mutation persisted to Supabase integrations.enabled column — confirmed by page reload

steps.expected: Config dialog opens with API key input
steps.observed: Dialog opened with title 'Configure thirdweb', description 'Enter credentials and settings for the thirdweb integration.', API Key input field, Cancel and Save Configuration buttons

steps.action: Fill API key field with test value

steps.expected: Dialog closes, config saved to Supabase
steps.observed: Dialog closed. Toast notification 'Configuration saved' appeared. Thirdweb card status changed from 'Disconnected' to 'Connected' (green dot)

steps.action: Re-open config dialog to verify persistence
steps.expected: API key field pre-populated with saved value
steps.observed: Dialog re-opened with API Key field showing masked value (dots). get_value returned 'test-api-key-12345' — confirmed Supabase persistence to integrations.config JSONB

steps.action: Clean up: clear API key and save empty config
steps.observed: API key cleared and empty config saved successfully

evidence.network: POST to Supabase integrations table for config JSONB update — confirmed by toast and re-opened dialog

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All 16 integration cards render correctly with names, status badges, and toggles. Toggle enable/disable persists to Supabase across page reloads. Config dialog opens with API key input, saves to Supabase integrations.config JSONB, and re-populates on re-open.
